---
title: "Getting Started"
sidebar: en
---

## Requirements

- A self-hosted, reachable Paperless-ngx instance (HTTPS recommended).
- An API token for your user (see below).

## Create an API token in Paperless-ngx

1. Sign in to Paperless.
2. From the user menu in the top right, open **My Profile**.
3. In the profile tab, open the **API Token** section and generate a new token.
4. Copy the token — it is shown only once.

## Configure the app

1. Install the app from the store and open it.
2. In the setup dialog, enter:
   - **Server URL** (e.g. `https://docs.example.org`)
   - **API Token** from the step above
3. The app checks the connection. On success you land directly in the document list.

![Setup screen with fields for server URL and API token.](../_screens/android-login.png){width=320}

## Notes

- URL and token are stored in the platform secure store and only sent to the configured server URL.
- Self-signed certificates are not accepted automatically; serve your instance behind a regularly signed certificate (e.g. Let's Encrypt).
- The app speaks only the official Paperless-ngx API. It is not a replacement for the web UI on admin tasks.
